creator: noway@nohow.demon.co.uk
text:
Starlogo-1.0 has been released.  This is an update to the existing port and
fixes the "missing distfile" problem.

How-To-Repeat: 
Apply the following uuencoded, gziped patch file.  NB: The program generates
a few java null pointer exceptions when run, however, this does not appear
to impact on the operation of the program.
